raw_consumer_statement:
This is regarding Barclays credit card. 
There were list of fraud charges back in year XXXX so I called Barclays credit card fraud department and after several attempt, the issue was finally resolved in XXXX of XXXX. My statement showed XXXX balance. 
However, in XX/XX/XXXX 's statement, there are XXXX fraud charges re appeared in my statement showing balance of {$2200.00}. 
I had to call fraud department and every time I called, they all advised me that it would take 30 days or 10 days to resolve issues, which has NOT happened till now, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX. 
This is the worst customer service of credit card company I've ever experienced. 
They should be accountable of fraud related issue, but it sounds like they are kicking the cans each other.
